'''shavomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadventurer|coadventurer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadventurer|coadventurer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shavomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shævemeth|shævemeth]] || [[word:shævemej|shævemej]] || [[word:shævemesh|shævemesh]] || [[word:shæveme|shæveme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavovomoth|shavovomoth]] || [[word:shavovomoj|shavovomoj]] || [[word:shavovomosh|shavovomosh]] || [[word:shavovomo|shavovomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavomoth|shavomoth]] || [[word:shavomoj|shavomoj]] || [[word:shavomosh|shavomosh]] || [[word:shavomo|shavomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavofmoth|shavofmoth]] || [[word:shavofmoj|shavofmoj]] || [[word:shavofmosh|shavofmosh]] || [[word:shavofmof|shavofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shavomotho|shavomotho]] || [[word:shavomojo|shavomojo]] || [[word:shavomosho|shavomosho]] || [[word:shavomoko|shavomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shavomoth|shavomoth]] || [[word:shavomoj|shavomoj]] || [[word:shavomosh|shavomosh]] || [[word:shavomo|shavomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shavomothol|shavomothol]] || [[word:shavomojol|shavomojol]] || [[word:shavomoshol|shavomoshol]] || [[word:shavomokol|shavomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shavomothotho|shavomothotho]] || [[word:shavomojojo|shavomojojo]] || [[word:shavomoshosho|shavomoshosho]] || [[word:shavomoko|shavomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shavomothon|shavomothon]] || [[word:shavomojon|shavomojon]] || [[word:shavomoshon|shavomoshon]] || [[word:shavomokon|shavomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shavomothoro|shavomothoro]] || [[word:shavomojoro|shavomojoro]] || [[word:shavomoshoro|shavomoshoro]] || [[word:shavomokoro|shavomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
